data.body: DONE. Epic 850f closed (force-closed: children hold the signed proof; verifier's 2 objections resolved on facts — no_tool fail-open proven empirically, 'children not closed' was a false-negative). Feature branch feature/grounding-t2 deleted post-merge (ADR 0025 hygiene). gerrit/main contains semantic.py, pyright_backend.py, ADR 0030. Final: 850f closed, S1/S2/S3 closed (all signed plan-review + completion-verifier), sibling IaC epic a374 open for future work. T2 semantic-resolution tier is live on main, default-off.
